title: Tidy Up: Spaceship
description:
A cozy sci-fi tidy-up game. Gather the books scattered across your ship and sort each one into its rightful place. Play in calm normal gravity or start on Zero-G mode, where the books float in mid-air. No timers, no pressure.

What You DoYour job is simple: tidy the ship. Search the room for scattered books, carry them back to the shelves, and sort them into the correct sections. Some books belong together, some shelves reject your logic, and sometimes the fastest solution is a very confident throw across the room.

Main Features- First-person book sorting and shelf organization 

- Carry, stack, place, drop, and throw books 

- Shelf indicator that help you sort books correctly.  

- New rooms unlock as you clean

 - Sci-fi spaceship setting with a cozy cleanup mood 

- Zero-G mode for a more chaotic run

 - Powerups like bigger carry stacks, longer reach, and guided throws

Modes you have 2 modes one normal mode and one zerog mode where tidying becomes a lot less sensible. Books float, throws matter more, and powerups help you survive the mess.
description_short: A cozy sci-fi tidy-up game. Gather the books scattered across your ship and sort each one into its rightful place. Play in calm normal gravity or start on Zero-G mode, where the books float in mid-air. No timers, no pressure.
